---
title: "Resources"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---

## Quarto Extensions

[Link to invoice Quarto Extension](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/quarto_extensions/tree/main/invoice)

[Link to Resume Quarto Extension](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/quarto_extensions/tree/main/Resume)

[Link to Cover Letter Quarto Extension](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/quarto_extensions/tree/main/CoverLetter)

## Dashboard Example

[University of Oregon Graduate School Dashboard](https://jpedroza1228.github.io/gradschool_dashboard/)

## Shiny Examples

[Neuropsychology Assessment Calculations](https://jp-shinyapps.shinyapps.io/neuropsych_calculations/)

-   [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/neuropsych_calculations)

[Prophet Stock Price Parameters Shiny App](https://jp-shinyapps.shinyapps.io/stock_price_parameters/)

-   [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/data_visualizations/blob/master/stock_prices/app.R)

[Discrete Bayesian Network Modeling with no Coding](https://hub.docker.com/r/japedroza1228/bayesnetapp) (Docker Image)

-   [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/bayes-net-app)

## Visualizations With Write Ups

[Reductions in Physical Activity in California Counties](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/projects_portfolio_and_practice/blob/main/projects/visualization_portfolio/Visualization1.pdf)

[Funding for University of Oregon Teaching Assistants](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/projects_portfolio_and_practice/blob/main/projects/visualization_portfolio/Visualization2.pdf)

[The Importance of Including Variables in Models](https://github.com/jpedroza1228/projects_portfolio_and_practice/blob/main/projects/visualization_portfolio/Visualization3.pdf)
